components.name: DynamicField
components.description: Core form component that renders a dynamic form field based on a spec and config. Manages form state, validation, search, mutators, and renders the field tree via Controller.

props.name: name
props.description: The name/path of the form field

props.name: spec
props.description: The specification object describing the field type, view, and validation

props.name: config
props.description: Configuration mapping spec types to input components and layouts

props.name: Monaco
props.description: Optional Monaco editor component for code editing fields

props.name: search
props.type: string | ((spec: Spec, input: FieldValue, name: string) => boolean)
props.description: Search string or custom search function for filtering visible fields

props.name: generateRandomValue
props.description: Function to generate random values for string fields

props.name: withoutInsertFFDebounce
props.description: Disable debounce when inserting field values into final-form

props.name: destroyOnUnregister
props.description: Whether to destroy field value when the field is unregistered

props.name: mutators
props.description: External mutators for customizing form field behavior

props.name: shared
props.description: Shared state accessible by all fields via useFormShared hook

props.name: storeSubscriber
props.description: Callback invoked whenever the form store changes

props.name: __mirror
props.description: Internal mirror object for testing and debugging field state

components.name: Controller
components.description: Internal controller component that manages individual field state, validation, and renders the appropriate input/layout pair. Used by DynamicField to recursively render the form tree.

props.name: spec
props.description: The specification object for this field

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path

props.name: value
props.description: The current field value from the parent

props.name: parentOnChange
props.type: ((childName: string, childValue: FieldValue, childErrors: Record<string, ValidateError>) => void) | null
props.description: Callback to propagate changes to the parent controller

props.name: parentOnUnmount
props.description: Callback to notify parent when this field unmounts

components.name: DynamicView
components.description: Core view component that renders a read-only view of form data based on a spec and config. Used to display submitted or saved form values.

props.name: value
props.description: The form data to display

props.name: spec
props.description: The specification describing the data structure and view configuration

props.name: config
props.description: Configuration mapping spec types to view components and layouts

props.name: Link
props.description: Optional component for rendering linked values

props.name: Monaco
props.description: Optional Monaco editor component for code view fields

props.name: showLayoutDescription
props.description: Whether to show layout descriptions in the view

props.name: shared
props.description: Shared state accessible by all view components via useViewShared hook

components.name: ViewController
components.description: Internal view controller that resolves view components and layouts for a given spec and renders the view tree.

props.name: spec
props.description: The specification object for this view field

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path

components.name: AccordeonCard
components.description: A collapsible card component with accordion behavior, header, description, and toggle functionality.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the card body

props.name: name
props.description: Unique name used for QA selectors

props.name: header
props.description: Header content or string title

props.name: description
props.description: HTML description shown below the header

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Callback when toggle state changes

props.name: headerActionsTemplate
props.description: Additional actions rendered in the header area

props.name: ignoreHeaderToggle
props.description: Disable toggle on header click

props.name: titleSize
props.description: Size variant for the title text

props.name: alwaysOpen
props.description: Keep the card always expanded, hiding the toggle button

props.name: classNameBody
props.description: Additional CSS class for the body section

components.name: Card
components.description: A collapsible card container with title, description tooltip, actions slot, and toggle functionality. Wraps GravityUI Card component.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the card body

props.name: name
props.description: Unique name used for QA selectors

props.name: title
props.description: Card title, shown with ellipsis and popover if string

props.name: description
props.description: HTML description shown in a HelpMark tooltip

props.name: actions
props.description: Action buttons rendered in the header right area

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Callback when toggle state changes

props.name: alwaysOpen
props.description: Keep the card always expanded

props.name: disableHeaderToggle
props.description: Disable toggle on header click

props.name: checkEmptyBody
props.description: Add empty-body class when body has no child elements

components.name: CopyButton
components.description: Renders a clipboard copy button for string and number fields when spec.viewSpec.copy is enabled.

props.name: spec
props.description: The field specification

props.name: value
props.description: The value to copy to clipboard

components.name: ErrorWrapper
components.description: Wraps form field content and displays validation error messages when the field is touched or form submission failed.

props.name: children
props.description: The form field content to wrap

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for error data attributes

props.name: meta
props.description: Field metadata containing error, touched, and submitFailed states

props.name: withoutChildErrorStyles
props.description: Disable error styling on the wrapper element

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name

components.name: GroupIndent
components.description: Simple wrapper that adds left indentation to child content for visual grouping.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to indent

components.name: GenerateRandomValueButton
components.description: Button that generates a random value for a string field using the generateRandomValue function from DynamicField context.

props.name: spec
props.description: The string field specification

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback to update the field value with the generated value

components.name: HTMLContent
components.description: Renders raw HTML content using dangerouslySetInnerHTML.

props.name: html
props.description: HTML string to render

components.name: LazyLoader
components.description: Renders a React.lazy component with Suspense and caches the resolved component as fallback for subsequent re-renders.

props.name: component
props.description: The lazy-loaded component to render

props.name: initialFallback
props.description: Fallback element shown during initial loading

components.name: LongValue
components.description: Displays a text value with ellipsis truncation and click-to-expand behavior when the content overflows.

props.name: value
props.description: The value to display

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler, also toggles expand/collapse for long values

components.name: SimpleVerticalAccordeon
components.description: A vertical accordion component with title, tooltip, and configurable open/close behavior. Supports hide-instead-of-destroy mode and branch view styling.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the accordion body

props.name: name
props.description: Unique name used for QA selectors

props.name: title
props.description: Accordion title text

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the accordion is expanded

props.name: titleSize
props.description: Size variant for the title text

props.name: note
props.description: HTML tooltip content shown via HelpMark

props.name: openTitle
props.description: Alternative title shown when accordion is open

props.name: headerActionsTemplate
props.description: Additional actions in the header

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: CSS class for the content body

props.name: buttonClassName
props.description: CSS class for the toggle button

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback when open state changes

props.name: hideInsteadOfDestroy
props.description: Hide content with CSS instead of unmounting when collapsed

props.name: withBranchView
props.description: Enable branch-style visual indentation

props.name: viewLayout
props.description: Enable view layout mode that hides empty sections

props.name: variantTitle
props.description: Override the title text variant

components.name: TogglerCard
components.description: A selection card used as a toggler option in OneOf fields. Displays title, description tooltip, and body text.

props.name: title
props.description: Card title

props.name: text
props.description: Body text content

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for selection

props.name: selected
props.description: Whether this card is currently selected

props.name: description
props.description: HTML description shown in a HelpMark tooltip

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the card is disabled

components.name: Text
components.description: Text input component for string and number fields. Renders a TextInput or PasswordInput based on spec.viewSpec.type.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.type: { value: string; onBlur: () => void; onChange: (value: string) => void; onFocus: () => void }
props.description: Input handlers and current value from Controller

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification with viewSpec for disabled, placeholder, type

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional props passed to the underlying TextInput component

components.name: TextArea
components.description: Multi-line text area input component for string fields with auto-resizing rows.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.type: { value: string; onBlur: () => void; onChange: (value: string) => void; onFocus: () => void }
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional props passed to the underlying TextArea component

components.name: Select
components.description: Single-value select dropdown for string fields. Auto-enables filtering when enum has more than 9 options. Supports custom options and meta text.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.type: { value: string; onBlur: () => void; onChange: (value: string) => void; onFocus: () => void }
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification with enum, description, and selectParams

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional props including withCustomOptions flag

components.name: MultiSelect
components.description: Multi-value select dropdown for array fields. Supports custom options, meta text, and auto-filtering.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.type: { value: FieldArrayValue; onBlur: () => void; onChange: (value: FieldArrayValue) => void; onFocus: () => void }
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification with enum, description, and selectParams

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional props including withCustomOptions flag

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Boolean checkbox input component wrapping GravityUI Checkbox.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.type: { value: boolean; onBlur: () => void; onChange: (value: boolean) => void; onFocus: () => void }
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional props passed to Checkbox

components.name: CheckboxGroup
components.description: Multi-value checkbox group input for array fields. Renders checkboxes from spec.enum with vertical or horizontal placement.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.type: { value: FieldArrayValue; onBlur: () => void; onChange: (value: FieldArrayValue) => void; onFocus: () => void }
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification with enum, description, and checkboxGroupParams

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional props passed to each Checkbox

components.name: Switch
components.description: Boolean toggle switch input component wrapping GravityUI Switch.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.type: { value: boolean; onBlur: () => void; onChange: (value: boolean) => void; onFocus: () => void }
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification

components.name: RadioGroup
components.description: Radio button group input for string fields. Renders options from spec.enum with horizontal or vertical direction.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.type: { value: string; onBlur: () => void; onChange: (value: string) => void; onFocus: () => void }
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification with enum, description, and radioGroupParams

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional props including withCustomOptions flag

components.name: NumInput
components.description: Numeric input component wrapping GravityUI NumberInput with decimal support.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.type: { value: number | undefined; onBlur: () => void; onChange: (value: number | undefined) => void; onFocus: () => void }
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional props passed to NumberInput

components.name: NumberWithScale
components.description: Number input with a scale/unit selector dropdown. Converts between display value and storage value using configurable scale factors.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.type: { value: string; onBlur: () => void; onChange: (value: string) => void; onFocus: () => void }
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification with viewSpec.sizeParams containing scale configuration

components.name: DateInput
components.description: Date picker input using @gravity-ui/date-components. Supports configurable output formats (string, date, timestamp, date_time), time zones, and print formats.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.type: { value: string; onChange: (value: string) => void; onBlur: () => void; onFocus: () => void }
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification with viewSpec.dateInput configuration

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional props passed to DatePicker

components.name: Secret
components.description: Object input that renders only the 'raw' property of an object spec with transparent layout. Used for secret/sensitive value fields.

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification containing a 'raw' property

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.description: Input handlers including value, onChange, parentOnUnmount

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout wrapper component

components.name: FileInput
components.description: File upload input that reads file contents as a string. Supports configurable readAs method and accept file types.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification with viewSpec.fileInput config (readAsMethod, accept)

components.name: MonacoInput
components.description: Code editor input using Monaco Editor with syntax highlighting, configurable language, and an expandable dialog mode.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.description: Input handlers and current value

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification with viewSpec.monacoParams config

props.name: MonacoComponent
props.description: Monaco editor component override

props.name: withoutDialog
props.description: Disable the expand-to-dialog button

components.name: ArrayBase
components.description: Base array input that renders a list of child Controllers with add/remove item functionality. Supports item labels, prefixes, and configurable add button position.

props.name: spec
props.description: Array field specification with items, defaultValue, and viewSpec

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: arrayInput
props.type: { value: FieldArrayValue; onItemAdd: (value: FieldValue) => void; onItemRemove: (idx: string | number) => void; onDrop: () => void }
props.description: Array-specific input handlers

props.name: input
props.type: { value: FieldValue; onChange: Function; name: string; parentOnUnmount: Function }
props.description: Standard input handlers

props.name: meta
props.description: Field metadata with childErrors

components.name: ObjectBase
components.description: Base object input that renders child Controllers for each property in the spec. Supports ordered properties, delimiters, and inline mode.

props.name: spec
props.description: Object field specification with properties, viewSpec.order, viewSpec.delimiter

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.description: Input handlers

props.name: Layout
props.description: Layout wrapper component

props.name: inline
props.description: Render in inline mode, filtering properties for inline display

components.name: ObjectInline
components.description: ObjectBase rendered in inline mode, filtering properties for compact horizontal display.

props.name: spec
props.description: Object field specification

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.description: Input handlers

props.name: Layout
props.description: Layout wrapper component

components.name: OneOf
components.description: Discriminated union input that renders a toggler (radio/select/card/checkbox/switch) to select one variant and a Controller for the selected property.

props.name: spec

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.description: Input handlers

props.name: Layout
props.description: Layout wrapper component

props.name: withoutIndent
props.description: Disable indentation for the selected variant content

components.description: OneOf input variant without visual indentation for the selected variant content.

props.description: Object specification with properties representing union variants

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.description: Input handlers

props.name: Layout
props.description: Layout wrapper component

components.description: OneOf input rendered inside a collapsible Card with a toggler in the header. Supports array item removal and auto-opens on validation errors.

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification with properties representing union variants

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.description: Input handlers

props.name: meta
props.description: Field metadata for error checking

props.name: Layout
props.description: Layout wrapper component

components.description: Multi-select union input that allows selecting multiple properties from an object spec. Renders a multi-select dropdown and Controllers for each selected property.

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification with properties representing selectable variants

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.description: Input handlers

props.name: Layout
props.description: Layout wrapper component

props.name: withoutIndent
props.description: Disable indentation for selected variant content

components.name: MultiOneOfFlat
components.description: MultiOneOf input variant without visual indentation.

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.description: Input handlers

props.name: Layout
props.description: Layout wrapper component

components.description: Object input that renders only the designated 'value' property with transparent layout. Used for wrapped value objects.

props.description: Field name

props.description: Input handlers

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.description: Input handlers

props.description: Layout wrapper component

components.description: Array input rendered as a table with configurable columns. Each row represents an array item with add/remove controls and search filtering support.

props.name: spec
props.description: Array specification with items (ObjectSpec) and viewSpec.table column config

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: arrayInput
props.type: { value: FieldArrayValue; onItemAdd: (value: FieldValue) => void; onItemRemove: (idx: string | number) => void }
props.description: Array-specific input handlers

props.name: input
props.type: { value: FieldValue; onChange: Function; name: string; parentOnUnmount: Function }
props.description: Standard input handlers

components.description: Time range selector with start and end time dropdowns. Filters available options based on selected values to prevent invalid ranges.

props.description: Object specification with startTime and endTime string properties

props.name: name
props.description: Field name

props.name: input
props.description: Input handlers

props.name: Layout
props.description: Layout wrapper component

hooks.name: useOneOf
hooks.description: Hook for managing one-of (discriminated union) field state. Returns the current selected value, spec properties, and toggler UI elements (radio/select/card/checkbox/switch).
hooks.signature: useOneOf(params: UseOneOfParams) => { oneOfValue: string; specProperties: Record<string, Spec>; toggler: React.ReactNode; togglerInput: React.ReactNode }

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Object with props (ObjectIndependentInputProps) and optional onTogglerChange callback

hooks.return_type: { oneOfValue: string; specProperties: Record<string, Spec>; toggler: React.ReactNode; togglerInput: React.ReactNode }

hooks.name: useErrorChecker
hooks.description: Hook that auto-opens a collapsible section when validation errors are detected after form submission. Checks for error data attributes in the DOM.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Object with name (string), meta (field metadata), open (boolean), setOpen ((flag: boolean) => void)

hooks.name: useMutateDFState
hooks.description: Hook to access the mutateDFState function from DynamicField context, allowing external mutation of the dynamic form state.

hooks.name: useStoreValue
hooks.description: Hook to access the current form store (values and errors) from DynamicField context.

hooks.name: useFormShared
hooks.description: Hook to access and update shared state within a DynamicField form. Returns the shared store and an onChangeShared updater function.
hooks.signature: useFormShared<SharedStore extends Record<string, any>>() => { store: SharedStore; onChangeShared: <Name extends keyof SharedStore, Value extends SharedStore[Name]>(name: Name, value: Value) => void }
hooks.return_type: { store: SharedStore; onChangeShared: (name: keyof SharedStore, value: SharedStore[keyof SharedStore]) => void }

hooks.name: useViewShared
hooks.description: Hook to access and update shared state within a DynamicView. Returns the shared store and an onChangeShared updater function.
hooks.signature: useViewShared<SharedStore extends Record<string, any>>() => { store: SharedStore; onChangeShared: <Name extends keyof SharedStore, Value extends SharedStore[Name]>(name: Name, value: Value) => void }
hooks.return_type: { store: SharedStore; onChangeShared: (name: keyof SharedStore, value: SharedStore[keyof SharedStore]) => void }

hooks.name: RemoveButton
hooks.description: A dropdown menu button used to remove/drop a form field item. Renders an ellipsis icon button that opens a danger-themed 'Delete' menu action. Used internally by layout components such as CardAccordeon, CardSection, Accordeon, AccordeonCard, and Section.

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path; used to generate the qa attribute for the dropdown switcher button

props.name: onDrop
props.description: Callback invoked when the user selects the delete action from the dropdown menu

props.name: switcherClassName
props.description: Optional CSS class applied to the ellipsis switcher button

hooks.name: CardAccordeon
hooks.description: A collapsible form layout that wraps field children in a Card component with accordion toggle behavior. The initial open state is driven by spec.viewSpec.layoutOpen. Automatically shows a RemoveButton when the field is an array item or when the value is present and the field is not required. Monitors errors and auto-opens the card if an error is detected.

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path used for error checking and remove button qa attribute

props.name: spec
props.description: The field specification; spec.viewSpec.layoutTitle, layoutDescription, and layoutOpen are used by this layout

props.name: input
props.description: The final-form input object; input.onDrop is called when the remove button is activated

props.name: meta
props.description: The final-form meta object used by useErrorChecker to detect validation errors and auto-open the card

props.name: children
props.description: The field content rendered inside the Card body, wrapped in an ErrorWrapper

hooks.name: CardSection
hooks.description: A non-collapsible form layout that wraps field children in an always-open Card component. Shows a RemoveButton when the field is an array item or when the value is present and the field is not required. Unlike CardAccordeon, the card is always expanded with no toggle behavior.

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path used for error wrapping and remove button qa attribute

props.name: spec
props.description: The field specification; spec.viewSpec.layoutTitle and layoutDescription are displayed in the card header

props.name: input
props.description: The final-form input object; input.onDrop is called when the remove button is activated

props.name: meta
props.description: The final-form meta object used for error display in the ErrorWrapper

props.name: children
props.description: The field content rendered inside the Card body, wrapped in an ErrorWrapper

hooks.name: Accordeon
hooks.description: A collapsible form layout using SimpleVerticalAccordeon. Works with both array and object field specs. Reads an optional variantTitle from spec.viewSpec.layoutProps to control the title text variant. Initial open state is driven by spec.viewSpec.layoutOpen. Shows a RemoveButton in the header when the field is an array item or non-required with a value. Auto-opens on validation error via useErrorChecker.

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path used for error checking and remove button qa attribute

props.name: spec
props.description: The field specification; spec.viewSpec.layoutTitle, layoutDescription, layoutOpen, and layoutProps.variantTitle are consumed by this layout

props.name: input
props.description: The final-form input object; input.onDrop is called when the remove button is activated

props.name: meta
props.description: The final-form meta object used by useErrorChecker to detect validation errors and auto-open the accordeon

props.name: children
props.description: The field content rendered inside the SimpleVerticalAccordeon body, wrapped in an ErrorWrapper

hooks.name: AccordeonCard
hooks.description: A collapsible form layout that wraps array or object field children in an AccordeonCard component. The exported name is AccordeonCardForm. Initial open state is driven by spec.viewSpec.layoutOpen. Shows a RemoveButton in the header when the field is an array item or non-required with a value. Auto-opens on validation error via useErrorChecker.

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path used for error checking and remove button qa attribute

props.name: spec
props.description: The field specification; spec.viewSpec.layoutTitle, layoutDescription, and layoutOpen are consumed by this layout

props.name: input
props.description: The final-form input object; input.onDrop is called when the remove button is activated

props.name: meta
props.description: The final-form meta object used by useErrorChecker to detect validation errors and auto-open the card

props.name: children
props.description: The field content rendered inside the AccordeonCard body, wrapped in an ErrorWrapper

hooks.name: Row
hooks.description: A horizontal two-column form layout: the left column shows the field title (with a required marker) and an optional HelpMark description popover; the right column renders the field input wrapped in ErrorWrapper. For array items, a trash-bin remove button is appended. Also renders a GenerateRandomValueButton when the spec includes random value generation. A RowVerbose variant is also exported that renders the description inline below the input instead of in a popover.

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path used for error wrapping and qa attributes on the remove button

props.name: spec
props.description: The field specification; spec.viewSpec.layoutTitle, layoutDescription, and spec.required drive the title and description rendering

props.name: input
props.description: The final-form input object; input.onDrop and input.onChange are used for the remove button and generate button

props.name: meta
props.description: The final-form meta object passed to ErrorWrapper for inline validation error display

props.name: children
props.description: The field input component rendered in the right column

hooks.name: Column
hooks.description: A vertical stacked form layout: the first row shows the field title and an optional HelpMark description popover; the second row renders the field input wrapped in ErrorWrapper. For array items, a trash-bin remove button is appended. Also renders a GenerateRandomValueButton when the spec includes random value generation. Similar to Row but arranged vertically rather than horizontally.

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path used for error wrapping and qa attributes on the remove button

props.name: spec
props.description: The field specification; spec.viewSpec.layoutTitle, layoutDescription, and spec.required drive the title and description rendering

props.name: input
props.description: The final-form input object; input.onDrop and input.onChange are used for the remove button and generate button

props.name: meta
props.description: The final-form meta object passed to ErrorWrapper for inline validation error display

props.name: children
props.description: The field input component rendered in the second row

hooks.name: Section
hooks.description: A section-style form layout that renders a titled header above the field children. The title is displayed with ellipsis and a Popover for overflow. The description is shown as a HelpMark popover next to the title. For array items, a RemoveButton is included in the header. Supports an optional variantTitle via spec.viewSpec.layoutProps. Also exported: Section2 (smaller title size), SectionWithSubtitle and SectionWithSubtitle2 (description rendered inline as subtitle), Group and Group2 (adds GroupIndent wrapping). All variants accept an ignoreDescription prop.

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path used for error wrapping and remove button generation

props.name: spec
props.description: The field specification; spec.viewSpec.layoutTitle, layoutDescription, and layoutProps.variantTitle are consumed; works with both LayoutProps and ViewLayoutProps

props.name: children
props.description: The field content rendered below the section header

props.name: ignoreDescription
props.description: When true, suppresses rendering of the layoutDescription even if present

props.name: input
props.description: The final-form input object; only present in form (non-view) usage; input.onDrop is used for the remove button on array items

props.name: meta
props.description: The final-form meta object; only present in form usage; passed to ErrorWrapper for validation error display

hooks.name: TableCell
hooks.description: A minimal table-cell form layout that wraps the field children in an ErrorWrapper with no additional chrome, title, or remove button. Intended for use as a cell layout inside table-style array views.

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path passed to ErrorWrapper

props.name: meta
props.description: The final-form meta object passed to ErrorWrapper for validation error display

props.name: children
props.description: The field input component rendered inside the ErrorWrapper

hooks.name: Transparent
hooks.description: A layout with no visible chrome that renders the field input directly with error wrapping. For array items it appends an inline trash-bin remove button. Supports max-width variation based on whether the spec is an array or object type. Also renders a GenerateRandomValueButton when the spec supports random value generation.

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path used for error wrapping and qa attributes on the remove button

props.name: spec
props.description: The field specification; used to determine isArrayItem, isArraySpec, isObjectSpec, and withGenerateButton behavior

props.name: input
props.description: The final-form input object; input.onDrop is called by the inline remove button; input.onChange is used by the generate button

props.name: meta
props.description: The final-form meta object passed to ErrorWrapper for validation error display

props.name: children
props.description: The field input component rendered inside the ErrorWrapper

hooks.name: BaseView
hooks.description: Generic read-only view for boolean, number, and string values. Renders the value as text using LongValue, with support for description maps (spec.description) to display human-readable labels. If the value is a string and a linkValue is provided, renders the link instead.

props.name: value
props.description: The current field value to display

props.name: spec
props.description: The field specification; spec.description is used to map values to human-readable labels

props.name: linkValue
props.description: When provided and value is a string, renders this node instead of the raw value (used for link rendering)

hooks.name: ArrayBaseView
hooks.description: Read-only view for array fields. Renders each array item using ViewController with the item spec. Supports an optional itemPrefix label (from spec.viewSpec.itemPrefix) displayed between items. Appends the 1-based index to each item's layoutTitle.

props.name: spec
props.description: Array field specification; spec.items defines the item spec, spec.viewSpec.itemPrefix sets the separator label

props.name: name
props.description: The field name/path, used to compose child names as name[idx]

props.name: value
props.description: Array of values to render

hooks.name: CheckboxGroupView
hooks.description: Read-only view for checkbox group (multi-value) array fields. Renders each selected value as a text item with a Popover tooltip for long values. Supports horizontal (default) and vertical layouts via spec.viewSpec.checkboxGroupParams.placement. In horizontal layout, items are separated by commas.

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; spec.description maps values to labels; spec.viewSpec.checkboxGroupParams.placement controls layout ('horizontal' | 'vertical')

props.name: value
props.description: Array of selected string values to display

hooks.name: CardOneOfView
hooks.description: Read-only view for oneOf object fields rendered inside a Card container. Displays the selected option's title (from spec.description or spec.properties[key].viewSpec.layoutTitle) as the card header, and renders the selected option's children via ViewController. The card is collapsible.

props.name: value
props.description: Object with a single key corresponding to the selected oneOf option

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification with properties defining the available oneOf options and optional description map

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path for composing child view names

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component; if provided, used to wrap the selected option title row instead of the default ViewRow

hooks.name: FileInputView
hooks.description: Read-only view for file input fields. When spec.viewSpec.fileInput.ignoreText is true, displays a localized 'Data loaded' label instead of the raw value. Otherwise displays the value via LongValue.

props.name: value
props.description: The file field value (e.g. file contents or identifier)

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; spec.viewSpec.fileInput.ignoreText controls whether to show the value or a generic 'Data loaded' message

hooks.name: MonacoView
hooks.description: Read-only Monaco editor view for string fields containing code or structured text. Renders the value in an embedded Monaco editor with a header showing the language and a button to open a full-screen dialog. Returns null if value is empty or Monaco is unavailable. Configured via spec.viewSpec.monacoParams (language, fontSize, header sizes, dialog button size).

props.name: value
props.description: The code/text value to display in the Monaco editor

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; spec.viewSpec.monacoParams configures language, fontSize, headerIconSize, headerIconIndent, headerTitleVariant, headerDialogButtonSize, headerDialogIconSize; spec.viewSpec.layoutTitle is used as the dialog title

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path, used for QA attribute on the open-dialog button

hooks.name: MultiOneOfView
hooks.description: Read-only view for multi-select oneOf object fields. Displays selected option titles as text items with Popover tooltips, then renders each selected option's children via ViewController indented beneath. Supports an optional withoutIndent prop to render flat without indentation.

props.name: value
props.description: Object whose keys are the selected option identifiers

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification with properties defining available options and optional description map for display labels

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path for composing child view names

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the selected option titles row

props.name: withoutIndent
props.description: When true, renders children without GroupIndent indentation (flat layout)

hooks.name: MultiOneOfFlatView
hooks.description: Variant of MultiOneOfView with withoutIndent forced to true, rendering selected options and their children in a flat layout without GroupIndent.

props.name: value
props.description: Object whose keys are the selected option identifiers

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification with properties defining available options and optional description map

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path for composing child view names

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the selected option titles row

hooks.name: MultiSelectView
hooks.description: Read-only view for multi-select array fields. Renders each selected string value as a text item with a Popover tooltip for long values. Values are mapped through spec.description for human-readable labels.

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; spec.description maps raw values to display labels

props.name: value
props.description: Array of selected string values to display

hooks.name: NumberWithScaleView
hooks.description: Read-only view for number-with-scale string fields. Converts the raw string value to a scaled representation using useInitial (e.g. bytes to KB/MB) and displays the scaled value alongside the scale unit title. Returns null if spec.viewSpec.sizeParams is missing or value is empty. Long values show a Popover tooltip.

props.name: value
props.description: The raw numeric string value to scale and display

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; spec.viewSpec.sizeParams must be defined with a scale map for unit conversion

hooks.name: ObjectBaseView
hooks.description: Read-only view for object fields. Renders each property's value using ViewController in the order defined by spec.viewSpec.order (or property declaration order). Supports optional delimiter text between properties (spec.viewSpec.delimiter). When inline is true, filters properties using filterPropertiesForObjectInline. If a Layout is provided and content is present, wraps the content in the layout.

props.name: spec
props.description: Object field specification; spec.properties defines child fields; spec.viewSpec.order sets render order; spec.viewSpec.delimiter sets text between properties

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path for composing child view names

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component to wrap the rendered properties content

props.name: inline
props.description: When true, filters properties to only those suitable for inline rendering using filterPropertiesForObjectInline

hooks.name: ObjectInlineView
hooks.description: Variant of ObjectBaseView with inline forced to true. Renders only inline-compatible object properties in a compact inline layout.

props.name: spec
props.description: Properties are filtered for inline display

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path for composing child view names

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component to wrap the rendered properties content

hooks.name: ObjectValueInputView
hooks.description: Read-only view for object fields that wrap a single value property (OBJECT_VALUE_PROPERTY_NAME constant). Extracts the inner value spec, strips its layout, and renders it via ViewController. Useful for objects that semantically hold one typed value with extra metadata. Returns null if the value property spec is absent.

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification; must have spec.properties[OBJECT_VALUE_PROPERTY_NAME] defined for the view to render anything

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path for composing the child value property view name

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the rendered value content

hooks.name: OneOfView
hooks.description: Read-only view for oneOf object fields. Displays the selected option's label (from spec.description, spec.properties[key].viewSpec.layoutTitle, or the key itself), with special handling for checkbox/switch togglers that use spec.viewSpec.oneOfParams.booleanMap. Renders the selected option's children via ViewController inside a GroupIndent. Returns null if value is empty.

props.name: value
props.description: Object with a single key identifying the selected oneOf option

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification; spec.description maps keys to labels; spec.viewSpec.oneOfParams.toggler and booleanMap support checkbox/switch togglers

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path for composing child view names

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the selected option label

props.name: withoutIndent
props.description: When true, renders without GroupIndent indentation (flat layout)

hooks.name: OneOfFlatView
hooks.description: Variant of OneOfView with withoutIndent forced to true. Renders the selected option label and its children without GroupIndent indentation.

props.name: value
props.description: Object with a single key identifying the selected oneOf option

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification with properties and optional description map

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path for composing child view names

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the selected option label

hooks.name: TableArrayView
hooks.description: Read-only view for array fields that renders items in a GravityUI Table. Requires spec.items to be an ObjectSpec and spec.viewSpec.table to define column config (property, label, description, width). Each column renders the matching object property via ViewController. An index column is prepended. Column headers can include a HelpMark with description when showLayoutDescription is enabled in context. Returns null if columns cannot be built or value is empty.

props.name: spec
props.description: Array specification; spec.items must be ObjectSpec; spec.viewSpec.table is an array of {property, label, description?, width?} column definitions

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path used to compose cell view names as name[idx].property

props.name: value
props.description: Array of object values representing table rows

hooks.name: TextAreaView
hooks.description: Read-only view for textarea string fields. Displays the value as text. When the value exceeds 50 characters, the view becomes interactive: clicking toggles between collapsed (ellipsis) and expanded (break-spaces) display, with a ChevronDown icon indicator.

props.name: value
props.description: The text value to display; values longer than 50 characters get a collapsible/expandable toggle

hooks.name: TextContentView
hooks.description: Read-only view for text content fields. Delegates rendering to the shared TextContentComponent (also used by the TextContent input). Wraps the optional Layout prop to inject the field name and a stub value for layout compatibility.

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification passed to TextContentComponent for rendering the text content

props.name: value
props.description: The text content value

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path injected into the wrapped Layout component

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component; wrapped to inject name and a stub value before passing to TextContentComponent

hooks.name: TextLinkView
hooks.description: Read-only view for text-link object fields. Extracts the 'text' string property from spec.properties, strips its layout, copies value.link into the spec, then renders it via ViewController. This enables the underlying string view to render the value as a hyperlink using the link context. Returns null if the text property spec is missing or value.text is absent.

props.name: value
props.description: Object with text to display and optional link URL

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification; must have spec.properties.text as a StringSpec

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path for composing the child text property view name

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the rendered link content

hooks.name: TimeRangeSelectorView
hooks.description: Read-only view for time range object fields. Expects spec.properties to contain START_TIME and END_TIME string properties. Clones each spec, sets their layout to 'row', and renders both via ViewController. Returns null if either spec is missing or not a StringSpec.

props.name: value
props.description: Object with start and end time values

props.name: spec
props.description: Object specification; must have spec.properties[START_TIME] and spec.properties[END_TIME] as StringSpec entries

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path for composing child view names

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping both time range child views

hooks.name: DateView
hooks.description: Read-only view for date string fields. Formats the value using dateTimeParse from @gravity-ui/date-utils with spec.viewSpec.dateInput config (printFormat, outputFormat, timeZone). Supports Timestamp objects ({seconds, nanos?}) by converting seconds to milliseconds. Falls back to the raw value string if parsing fails. Renders via BaseView.

props.name: value
props.description: The date value as an ISO string, numeric string, or Timestamp object with seconds/nanos

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; spec.viewSpec.dateInput configures printFormat (display format, default DEFAULT_DATE_FORMAT), outputFormat (input parse format), and timeZone

hooks.name: ViewAccordeon
hooks.description: View layout that wraps content in a collapsible vertical accordion. Only renders when the value is non-empty. Reads layoutOpen from viewSpec to set the initial open state (defaults to true). Renders layout description as a note when showLayoutDescription context is enabled. Supports a custom title text variant via layoutProps.variantTitle.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path used for QA selectors and identification

props.name: value
props.description: Current field value; if empty, renders null

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; viewSpec.layoutTitle sets accordion title, viewSpec.layoutOpen sets initial open state, viewSpec.layoutDescription sets the note, viewSpec.layoutProps.variantTitle sets title text variant

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the accordion body

hooks.name: ViewCardAccordeon
hooks.description: View layout that wraps content in a collapsible Card component with accordion behavior. Only renders when value is non-empty. Reads layoutOpen from viewSpec for initial open state (defaults to true). Uses the Card component with checkEmptyBody enabled, which hides the card if the body is empty after rendering.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path used for QA selectors

props.name: value
props.description: Current field value; if empty, renders null

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; viewSpec.layoutTitle sets the card title, viewSpec.layoutOpen sets the initial open state

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the card body

hooks.name: ViewAccordeonCard
hooks.description: View layout that wraps content in an AccordeonCard component. Only renders when value is non-empty. Reads layoutOpen from viewSpec for initial open state (defaults to true). Uses the AccordeonCard primitive (which differs from Card in that it has a simpler toggle mechanism).

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path used for QA selectors and identification

props.name: value
props.description: Current field value; if empty, renders null

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; viewSpec.layoutTitle sets the accordion card header, viewSpec.layoutOpen sets the initial open state

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the accordion card body

hooks.name: ViewCardSection
hooks.description: View layout that wraps content in a always-open Card section. Only renders when value is non-empty. The card is always expanded (alwaysOpen) and hides itself if the body is empty (checkEmptyBody). Title comes from viewSpec.layoutTitle.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path used for QA selectors

props.name: value
props.description: Current field value; if empty, renders null

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; viewSpec.layoutTitle sets the card title

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the card body

hooks.name: ViewRow
hooks.description: View layout that renders a horizontal key-value row. Left side shows the layoutTitle label (secondary color, nowrap, ellipsis) with an optional HelpMark description tooltip and a dotted spacer. Right side renders children. Appends a CopyButton for copying the value. Only renders when value is non-empty. Shows description help mark when showLayoutDescription context is true.

props.name: value
props.description: Current field value; if empty, renders null

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; viewSpec.layoutTitle sets the row label, viewSpec.layoutDescription sets the help tooltip content

props.name: children
props.description: Value content rendered on the right side of the row

hooks.name: ViewColumn
hooks.description: View layout that renders a vertical label-over-value column. First row shows the layoutTitle label (secondary color, ellipsis) with an optional HelpMark description tooltip. Second row renders children. Appends a CopyButton for copying the value. Only renders when value is non-empty. Shows description help mark when showLayoutDescription context is true.

props.name: value
props.description: Current field value; if empty, renders null

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; viewSpec.layoutTitle sets the column label, viewSpec.layoutDescription sets the help tooltip content

props.name: children
props.description: Value content rendered below the label

hooks.name: ViewSection
hooks.description: View layout that renders content using the Section layout component with medium title size (body-2 variant). Only renders when value is non-empty. Delegates to the shared Section component with ignoreDescription set, suppressing the description tooltip in view context. Title comes from viewSpec.layoutTitle. Also exports ViewSection2 (small/body-1 title), ViewGroup (medium title with indent), and ViewGroup2 (small title with indent) from the same file.

props.name: value
props.description: Current field value; if empty, renders null

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; viewSpec.layoutTitle sets the section title, viewSpec.layoutProps.variantTitle overrides the title text variant

props.name: name
props.description: Field name/path

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the section body

hooks.name: ViewTableCell
hooks.description: View layout for rendering a value inside a table cell. Always renders (never returns null). When the value is non-empty, renders children in an inner div alongside a CopyButton. When the value is empty, renders an em dash ('—') as a placeholder. No label or title is displayed.

props.name: value
props.description: Current field value; determines whether children or the em dash placeholder is shown

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; passed to CopyButton for copy-to-clipboard behavior

props.name: children
props.description: Value content rendered when value is non-empty

hooks.name: ViewTransparent
hooks.description: Minimal view layout that renders children with no visible wrapper structure. Only renders when value is non-empty. Wraps children in an inner div and appends a CopyButton. No title, label, card, or accordion is shown — used when the field's value should appear inline without decoration.

props.name: value
props.description: Current field value; if empty, renders null

props.name: spec
props.description: Field specification; passed to CopyButton for copy-to-clipboard behavior

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the transparent wrapper
